summary:
The available data does not conclusively support that "Resin-based" refers directly to UDMA; however, previous knowledge suggested certain sealers contain specific resins including UDMA but new findings cast some doubts without firm proof regarding a particular product such as 'EndoRez'. Therefore, while uncertain, historical reliable sources indicated one sealer likely contains these components reliably enough until more precise validation occurs.
The most supported conclusion remains that \textbf{"resin-based"} could refer generally to materials used frequently by dentists which include various types beyond just UDMA alone. To be cautious yet informed given limited updated details provided here today suggests sticking closely to established practices indicating general inclusion within broader categories accurately
